name: Laminate Pivot Open Shoe Cabinet White - Brightroom™: Shoe Organizer, Holds 12 Pairs, Wood Laminate, Freestanding
description:
Keep your footwear hidden while organizing them neatly with the Laminate Pivot Open Shoe Cabinet from Brightroom™. Designed in a vertical alignment, this white shoe rack features multiple shelves to help keep your footwear organized. This wood-frame shoe cabinet fits well along the wall of your entryway or anywhere else you need extra storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
